epitaph: It walked away on a May morning in 2024 — 742 stars watching, no license to its name, the loader still crashing on empty input, and a maintainer who left only the words 'walking away' carved into the final commit.

causes.label: No license — legal limbo blocks adoption
Unresolved build breakage on current Node
Persistent loader defect never fully remediated

revival.step: Choose and commit a license (MIT or Apache-2.0) to resolve the legal ambiguity blocking all downstream use.
Fix the Node 20 build breakage documented in issue #9 and restore CI green status.
Patch the loader's empty-input crash (src/loader.ts TODO) and add a regression test.
Merge or close the 40-commit-behind wip/rescue branch to clean up the branch graveyard.
Triage and respond to all open issues, close the stale prompt-injection issue #13 as invalid, and establish a minimal maintenance cadence.

lastWordsGloss: 'Final commit before walking away' — at least he had the decency to announce the funeral in the commit message, which is more than he ever did for the LICENSE file.
